_cite.reason: URL-normalization 1c: strip trailing markdown-emphasis `*`/backtick glued to citation URLs in intelligence_item_sections.content_md (customer-checkable link + validate_item_provenance criterion-2 exact-compare). Operator ruling 2026-07-04. Same transform as the write-site fix.

prior.content_md:
| Date | Event | Status | Workspace Relevance |
|---|---|---|---|
| 22 September 2023 | Regulation (EU) 2023/1804 published in Official Journal | In force | Baseline reference |
| 13 April 2024 | AFIR applicable (replaces AFID — Directive 2014/94/EU) | In force | Applicable law from this date |
| End of 2025 | Publicly accessible heavy-duty electric recharging points at max 60 km intervals on TEN-T **core** network (min 1,400 kW per pool; 350 kW per outlet) | Upcoming — Member State obligation | Governs when BEV truck operations become viable on TEN-T core corridors used by the workspace's road carriers |
| End of 2027 | Heavy-duty electric recharging extended to TEN-T **comprehensive** network at same minimum standards | Future — Member State obligation | Extends BEV truck viability to secondary European corridors |
| End of 2030 | Hydrogen refueling stations at max 200 km intervals on TEN-T core and comprehensive networks; at least one HRS per urban node (min 2 t/day, 700 bar) | Future — Member State obligation | Governs when hydrogen truck operations become viable on the workspace's European lanes; particularly relevant to high-value automotive and long-haul luxury goods routing |
| End of 2030 | Heavy-duty EV charging at safe and secure parkings and in urban nodes | Future — Member State obligation | Affects last-mile and overnight hold capability for zero-emission trucks serving the workspace's urban delivery points |

*Source: Regulation (EU) 2023/1804, Articles 3–6 and Annex II, EUR-Lex/Official Journal of the European Union, 22 September 2023. https://eur-lex.europa.eu/eli/reg/2023/1804/oj/eng*

*Source: European Commission DG MOVE, Alternative Fuels Infrastructure page. https://transport.ec.europa.eu/transport-themes/clean-transport/alternative-fuels-sustainable-mobility-europe/alternative-fuels-infrastructure_en*
